name: globalwindatlas_powerdensity
title: Wind Power Density Potential
details: The mean wind power density is a measure of the wind resource. Higher mean wind power densities indicate better wind resource.

processing_options.description: average power density per unit of analysis
maximum power density per unit of analysis
minimum power density per unit of analysis

variable_description: power density in Watts per meter squared
citation: Wind data obtained from the “Global Wind Atlas 2.0, a free, web-based application developed, owned and operated by the Technical University of Denmark (DTU) in partnership with the World Bank Group, utilizing data provided by Vortex, with funding provided by the Energy Sector Management Assistance Program (ESMAP).https://globalwindatlas.info/. Accessed online 2019-03-05.
